spell.name: Eye of Kilrogg
spell.description: Summons an Eye of Kilrogg and binds your vision to it. The eye is stealthed and moves quickly but is very fragile.
spell.tooltip: Controlling Eye of Kilrogg. Detecting Invisibility.

spell.name: Corruption
spell.description: Corrupts the target, causing $s3 Shadow damage and $?a196103[$146739s1 Shadow damage every $146739t1 sec.][an additional $146739o1 Shadow damage over $146739d.]

spell.name: Immolate
spell.description:
Burns the enemy, causing $s1 Fire damage immediately and an additional $157736o1 Fire damage over $157736d.
|cFFFFFFFFPeriodic damage generates 1 Soul Shard Fragment and has a $s2% chance to generate an additional 1 on critical strikes.|r

spell.name: Shadow Bolt

Sends a shadowy bolt at the enemy, causing $s1 Shadow damage.$?c2[
|cFFFFFFFFGenerates 1 Soul Shard.|r][]

spell.name: Summon Imp

spell.name: Summon Felhunter

spell.name: Summon Voidwalker
spell.description: Summons a Voidwalker under your command, able to withstand heavy punishment.

spell.name: Ritual of Summoning
spell.description: Begins a ritual to create a summoning portal, requiring the caster and 2 allies to complete. This portal can be used to summon party and raid members.

spell.description:

|cFF8282FFCurses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.|r
spell.tooltip: Time between attacks increased by $w1%. $?e1[Chance to critically strike reduced by $w2%.][]

spell.name: Banish
spell.description: Banishes an enemy Demon, Aberration$?s386651[, Undead][], or Elemental, preventing any action for $d. Limit 1. Casting Banish again on the target will cancel the effect.
spell.tooltip: Invulnerable, but unable to act.

spell.name: Agony
spell.description:
Inflicts increasing agony on the target, causing up to ${$s1*$d/$t1*$u} Shadow damage over $d. Damage starts low and increases over the duration. Refreshing Agony maintains its current damage level.
|cFFFFFFFFAgony damage sometimes generates 1 Soul Shard.|r
spell.tooltip: Suffering $w1 Shadow damage every $t1 sec. Damage increases over time.

spell.name: Subjugate Demon
spell.description: Subjugates the target demon up to level $s1, forcing it to do your bidding for $d.
spell.tooltip: $@auracaster's subject.

spell.name: Summon Infernal
spell.description:
Summons an Infernal from the Twisting Nether, impacting for $22703s1 Fire damage and stunning all enemies in the area for $22703d.
The Infernal will serve you for $111685d, dealing ${$20153s1*(100+$137046s3)/100} damage to all nearby enemies every $19483t1 sec and generating $264365s1 Soul Shard Fragment every $264364t1 sec.

spell.name: Curse of Tongues
spell.description:

|CFFE55BB0Soulburn: Your Curse of Tongues will affect all enemies in a $104224A yard radius around your target.|R][]
|cFF8282FFCurses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.|r
